blocks.text: The information, services, and digital content available on https://voidborn.fun (the "Website") are provided by:

blocks.name: Test LTD
blocks.address: 123 Example Street, Testville, TE1 1ST, United Kingdom

blocks.text: ("Company", "we", "us", or "our").
By accessing or using the Website and related services (the "Platform"), you acknowledge and agree to the following:
1. Entertainment Purpose Only
The Platform provides access to a digital card-based game and related features for entertainment purposes only.
Nothing on the Platform constitutes:

items: financial advice
investment advice
gambling services
betting services
professional advice of any kind

blocks.text: All gameplay outcomes, digital items, and in-platform features are part of an entertainment environment and should not be interpreted otherwise.
2. No Real-World Value or Financial Product
All virtual cards, boxes, packs, balance, credits, and other digital elements available on the Platform:

items: are internal virtual assets used within the game;
do not represent real-world currency or monetary value;
are not financial instruments, securities, or investment products;
are not cryptocurrencies or NFTs;
do not create ownership or property rights outside the Platform.

blocks.text: Any value assigned to virtual items exists only within the Platform environment and may change at any time.
3. No Guarantees
The Company makes no guarantees regarding:

items: the outcome of gameplay
the contents of digital boxes or packs
rarity, type, or characteristics of virtual cards
success of any in-game strategy or deck
ability to resell items through the Platform
demand, liquidity, or perceived value of any virtual item

blocks.text: All purchases and gameplay decisions are made at your own discretion and risk.
4. Internal Shop Disclaimer
The Platform may allow users to list and acquire virtual cards through an internal shop or market system.
The Company:

items: does not guarantee that any item will be sold;
does not guarantee pricing, demand, or resale outcomes;
does not provide any assurance of value retention;
may modify, restrict, suspend, or remove listings at its discretion.

blocks.text: All transactions within the Platform occur within a controlled environment and do not create external commercial or financial rights.
5. Payments and Withdrawals
All payments are processed by third-party payment service providers.
The Company:

items: does not control banking systems, card issuers, or payment networks;
does not guarantee uninterrupted payment processing;
does not guarantee that withdrawal requests will always be approved;
may delay, limit, or refuse transactions for security, fraud prevention, or compliance reasons.

blocks.text: Withdrawals, where available, are subject to strict conditions and are not equivalent to refunds.
6. No Liability for User Decisions
You are solely responsible for:

items: your use of the Platform;
your purchasing decisions;
your gameplay strategies;
your use of virtual items;
any transactions made through your account.

blocks.text: The Company shall not be liable for:

items: losses related to gameplay outcomes;
dissatisfaction with virtual items;
perceived loss of value of digital content;
inability to resell items;
decisions made based on Platform content.

blocks.text: 7. Technical and Service Limitations
The Platform is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.
The Company does not guarantee that:

items: the Website or Game will be uninterrupted or error-free;
the Platform will always be available;
bugs, errors, or exploits will not occur;
technical issues will not affect gameplay or transactions.

blocks.text: 8. Third-Party Services
The Platform may rely on third-party providers, including:

items: payment processors
hosting providers
analytics services

blocks.text: The Company is not responsible for:

items: actions or failures of third-party providers;
delays caused by banks or payment networks;
external service disruptions.

blocks.text: 9. Regulatory and Legal Compliance
The Company operates in accordance with applicable laws and payment industry requirements.
Users are responsible for ensuring that:

items: use of the Platform is lawful in their jurisdiction;
they comply with all applicable local laws and regulations.

blocks.text: The Company reserves the right to restrict or deny access to the Platform where required for legal, regulatory, or compliance reasons.
10. Changes to This Disclaimer
The Company may update this Disclaimer at any time. Updated versions will be published on the Website.
Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the updated Disclaimer.
11. Contact
If you have any questions regarding this Disclaimer, please contact:
support@voidborn.fun
